# BTSE REST API

> BTSE is a cryptocurrency exchange. This file lists all REST API endpoints for use by LLM agents, AI code-generation tools, and automated integrations.

## Authentication

All private endpoints require HMAC-SHA384 request signing. Include these three headers in every authenticated request:

- `request-api`: your API key (string)
- `request-nonce`: current timestamp in milliseconds (integer as string)
- `request-sign`: HMAC-SHA384(secret, urlpath + nonce + body)

Public (market-data) endpoints require no authentication.

---

<!-- generated: 2026-04-21T02:04:27Z | total: 69 endpoints -->

## Spot API v3.3
# source: spotV3_3/en/index.html.md

Base URL: https://api.btse.com/spot

### Market Summary

GET /api/v3.3/market_summary
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/market_summary
Auth: None (public)
Description: Gets market summary information. If no symbol parameter is sent, then all markets will be retrieved.
Required params: none

### Charting Data

GET /api/v3.3/ohlcv
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/ohlcv
Auth: None (public)
Description: Gets candle stick charting data. Default of 300 data points will be returned at any one time.
Required params: symbol, resolution

### Query Market price

GET /api/v3.3/price
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/price
Auth: None (public)
Description: Retrieve current prices on the platform. If no symbol specified, all symbols will be returned.
Required params: symbol

### Orderbook (By grouping)

GET /api/v3.3/orderbook
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/orderbook
Auth: None (public)
Description: Retrieves a Level 2 snapshot of the orderbook and allows you to specify grouping and also bid / asks depth
Required params: symbol

### Orderbook

GET /api/v3.3/orderbook/L2
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/orderbook/L2
Auth: None (public)
Description: Retrieves a Level 2 snapshot of the orderbook
Required params: symbol

### Query Trades Fills

GET /api/v3.3/trades
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/trades
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get trade fills for the market specified by `symbol`
Required params: symbol

### Query Server Time

GET /api/v3.3/time
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/time
Auth: None (public)
Description: Gets server time
Required params: none

### Create New Order

POST /api/v3.3/order
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/order
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Creates a new order. Requires `Trading` permission. Please note that Index Order only supports USD quotes.
Required params: symbol, size, side, type

POST /api/v3.3/order/peg
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/order/peg
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Creates a new order. Requires `Trading` permission. Please note that Index Order only supports USD quotes.
Required params: symbol, size, side, type

### Query Order

GET /api/v3.3/order
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/order
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Query order detail for a specified orderID/clOrderID, for the open orders and cancelled order which is cancelled in 30 minutes only.
Required params: none

### Amend Order

PUT /api/v3.3/order
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/order
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Amend the price or size or trigger price of an order. For trigger orders, if the order has already been triggered, the trigger price cannot be further amended. Amend order _does not_ apply to algo orders. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol, type

### Cancel Order

DELETE /api/v3.3/order
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/order
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Cancels pending orders that has not yet been transacted. The `orderID` is a unique identifier to cancel a particular order. `clOrderID` is a custom ID sent in by the trader. When cancel by `clOrderID`, all orders having the same ID will be cancelled. If `orderID` and `clOrderID` is not sent in, then cancellation will be for all orders in the current market. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol

### Dead Man's Switch (Cancel All After)

POST /api/v3.3/order/cancelAllAfter
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/order/cancelAllAfter
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Dead-man's switch allows the trader to send in a timeout value which is a Time to live (TTL) value for an order. Extension of the timeout is done by sending another `cancelAllAfter` request. If the server does not receive another request before the timeout is reached, all orders will be cancelled. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: timeout

### Query Open Orders

GET /api/v3.3/user/open_orders
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/user/open_orders
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Retrieves open orders that have not yet been matched or matched recently. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: none

### Query User Trades Fills

GET /api/v3.3/user/trade_history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/user/trade_history
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Retrieves a user's trade history which includes funding fee data. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: symbol

### query account fees

GET /api/v3.3/user/fees
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/user/fees
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Retrieve user's trading fees. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none

### Query Investment Products

GET /api/v3.3/invest/products
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/invest/products
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Get all investment products. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none

### Deposit Investment

POST /api/v3.3/invest/deposit
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/invest/deposit
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Deposit an investment. Requires `Wallet` permission.
Required params: productId, amount

### Renew Investment

POST /api/v3.3/invest/renew
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/invest/renew
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Renew an investment order. Requires `Wallet` permission.
Required params: orderId, autoRenew

### Redeem Investment

POST /api/v3.3/invest/redeem
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/invest/redeem
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Redeem an investment order. Requires `Wallet` permission.
Required params: orderId, amount

### Query Investment Orders

GET /api/v3.3/invest/orders
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/invest/orders
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Query investment orders. Requires `Wallet` permission.
Required params: none

### Query Investment History

GET /api/v3.3/invest/history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/invest/history
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Query investment history. Requires `Wallet` permission.
Required params: none


## Futures API v2.3
# source: futuresV2_3/en/index.html.md

Base URL: https://api.btse.com/futures

### Market Summary

GET /api/v2.3/market_summary
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/market_summary
Auth: None (public)
Description: Gets market summary information. If no symbol parameter is sent, then all markets will be retrieved.
Required params: none

### Charting Data

GET /api/v2.3/ohlcv
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/ohlcv
Auth: None (public)
Description: Gets candle stick charting data. Default of 300 data points will be returned at any one time.
Required params: symbol, resolution

### Query Market price

GET /api/v2.3/price
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/price
Auth: None (public)
Description: Retrieve current prices on the platform. If no symbol specified, all symbols will be returned.
Required params: symbol

### Orderbook (By grouping)

GET /api/v2.3/orderbook
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/orderbook
Auth: None (public)
Description: Retrieves a snapshot of the orderbook.
Required params: symbol

### Orderbook

GET /api/v2.3/orderbook/L2
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/orderbook/L2
Auth: None (public)
Description: Retrieves a Level 2 snapshot of the orderbook
Required params: symbol

### Query Trades Fills

GET /api/v2.3/trades
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/trades
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get trade fills for the market specified by `symbol`
Required params: symbol, count, includeOld

GET /api/v2.3/user/trade_history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/trade_history
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Retrieves a user's trade history. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none

### Funding History

GET /api/v2.3/funding_history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/funding_history
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get funding rate history for certain symbols
Required params: none

### Market Risk Limit Setting

GET /api/v2.3/market/risk_limit
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/market/risk_limit
Auth: None (public)
Description: Gets all default market settings, including initial margin and maintenance margin by each market and each risk limit level. You'll retrieve all markets if no symbol parameter is sent.
Required params: none

### Create New Order

POST /api/v2.3/order
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/order
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Creates a new order. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol, size, side, type

### Create New Algo Order

POST /api/v2.3/order/peg
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/order/peg
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Creates a new algo order. Algo order is an order that price will change according to market price. To create an algo order, user will need to enter additional parameters:
Required params: symbol, price, size, side

### Query Order

GET /api/v2.3/order
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/order
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Query order detail for a specified orderID/clOrderID, please note that a canceled order will only exist for 30 minutes. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: none

### Amend Order

PUT /api/v2.3/order
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/order
Auth: None (public)
Description: Amend the price or size or trigger price of an order. For trigger orders, if the order has already been triggered, the trigger price cannot be further amended. Amend order _does not_ apply to algo orders
Required params: symbol, type, value

### Cancel Order

DELETE /api/v2.3/order
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/order
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Cancels pending orders that has not yet been transacted. The `orderID` is a unique identifier to cancel a particular order. `clOrderID` is a custom ID sent in by the trader. When cancel by `clOrderID`, all orders having the same ID will be cancelled. If `orderID` and `clOrderID` is not sent in, then cancellation will be for all orders in the current market.
Required params: symbol

### Dead Man's Switch (Cancel All After)

POST /api/v2.3/order/cancelAllAfter
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/order/cancelAllAfter
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Dead-man's switch allows the trader to send in a timeout value which is a Time to live (TTL) value for an order. Extension of the timeout is done by sending another `cancelAllAfter` request. If the server does not receive another request before the timeout is reached, all orders will be cancelled. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: timeout

### Query Open Orders

GET /api/v2.3/user/open_orders
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/open_orders
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Retrieves open orders that have not yet been matched or matched recently. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none

### Query Position

GET /api/v2.3/user/positions
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/positions
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Queries user's current position. When no symbol is specified, positions for all markets will be returned.
Required params: none

### Close Position

POST /api/v2.3/order/close_position
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/order/close_position
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Closes a user's position for the particular market as specified by symbol. If type is specified as LIMIT, then price is mandatory. When type is MARKET, it closes the position at market price. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol, type

### Get Risk Limit

GET /api/v2.3/risk_limit
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/risk_limit
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Query risk limit for the specified market. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: symbol

### Set Risk Limit

POST /api/v2.3/risk_limit
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/risk_limit
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Changes risk limit for the specified market. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol, riskLimit `(Deprecated), riskLimitLevel

### Set Leverage

POST /api/v2.3/leverage
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/leverage
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Change leverage values for the specified market. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol, leverage

### Change Contract Settlement Currency

POST /api/v2.3/settle_in
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/settle_in
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Changes the settlement currency for the position in the current market. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol, currency

### Query Account Fee

GET /api/v2.3/user/fees
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/fees
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Retrieve user's trading fees. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none

### Bind TP/SL

POST /api/v2.3/order/bind/tpsl
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/order/bind/tpsl
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Bind TP/SL with an existing position. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol, side

### Query Position Mode

GET /api/v2.3/position_mode
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/position_mode
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Retrieve user's position mode. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none

### Change Position Mode

POST /api/v2.3/position_mode
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/position_mode
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Changes position mode. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: symbol, positionMode

### Query User Initial Margin Percentage And Maintenance Margin Percentage

GET /api/v2.3/user/margin_setting
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/margin_setting
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Queries user's initial margin percentage and maintenance margin percentage. When no symbol is specified, margin percentage for all markets will be returned. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none

### Query Wallet Balance

GET /api/v2.3/user/wallet
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/wallet
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Query user's wallet balance. Requires `Read` permissions on the API key.
Required params: wallet

### Query Wallet History

GET /api/v2.3/user/wallet_history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/wallet_history
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Get user's wallet history records on the futures wallet. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none

### Query Unified Wallet Margin

GET /api/v2.3/user/unifiedWallet/margin
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/unifiedWallet/margin
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: **This API is for the users who have upgraded wallet**
Required params: none

### Query Wallet Margin

GET /api/v2.3/user/margin
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/margin
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: The users who have upgraded wallet to unified wallet are not allow to use this API. Please use [`Query Unified Wallet Margin`](#query-unified-wallet-margin).
Required params: symbol

### Transfer funds between Futures wallet

POST /api/v2.3/user/wallet/transfer
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/user/wallet/transfer
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Transfer
Description: Transfers funds between user's wallet. User can specify the source and target wallet to transfer funds. Requires `Transfer` permission.
Required params: walletSrcType, walletDestType, apiWallets, currency, allBalance

### Sub-Account Wallet Transfer

POST /api/v2.3/subaccount/wallet/transfer
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/futures/api/v2.3/subaccount/wallet/transfer
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Transfers funds between user and sub-account wallet. User can specify the source and target wallet to transfer funds,
Required params: walletSrcType, walletDestType, fromUser, receiver, apiWallets, currency, allBalance


## Wallet API
# source: wallet/en/index.html.md

Base URL: https://api.btse.com/spot

### Query Wallet Balance

GET /api/v3.2/user/wallet
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Query user's wallet balance. Requires `Read` permissions on the API key.
Required params: none

### Query Wallet History

GET /api/v3.2/user/wallet_history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet_history
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get user's wallet history records on the spot wallet
Required params: none

### Create Wallet Address

POST /api/v3.3/user/wallet/address
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/user/wallet/address
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Creates a wallet address. If the address created has not been used before, a 400 error will return with the existing unused address. To use this API, `Wallet` permission is required.
Required params: currency, network

### Delete Wallet Address

DELETE /api/v3.3/user/wallet/address
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/user/wallet/address
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Delete  wallet address. If the address has been delete, a 400 error will return. To use this API, `Wallet` permission is required.
Required params: currency, network, address

### Get Wallet Address

GET /api/v3.3/user/wallet/address
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/user/wallet/address
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Gets a wallet address. To use this API, `Wallet` permission is required.
Required params: currency, network

### Withdraw Funds

POST /api/v3.3/user/wallet/withdraw
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/user/wallet/withdraw
Auth: None (public)
Description: Performs a wallet withdrawal. To use this API, `Withdraw` permission is required.
Required params: currency, address, tag, amount

### Query available currency list for wallet action

GET /api/v3.2/availableCurrencies
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/availableCurrencies
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get available currency list for wallet action.
Required params: action

### Convert funds

POST /api/v3.2/user/wallet/convert
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet/convert
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Performs a currency conversion from wallet. To use this API, `Wallet` permission is required. To get supported currency list please check [Available currency list for action](#query-available-currency-list-for-wallet-action)
Required params: amount, fromAsset, toAsset

### Transfer Funds

POST /api/v3.3/user/wallet/transfer
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.3/user/wallet/transfer
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Transfer
Description: Performs a internal currency transfer to other user from wallet. To use this API, `Transfer` permission is required. To get supported currency list please check [Available currency list for action](#query-available-currency-list-for-wallet-action)
Required params: amount, asset, toUser, toUserMail

### Subaccount transfer history

GET /api/v3.2/subaccount/wallet/history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/subaccount/wallet/history
Auth: None (public)
Description: Query transfer history for subaccounts
Required params: page, pageSize


## OTC API
# source: otc/en/index.html.md

Base URL: https://api.btse.com/otc

### Market Summary

GET /api/v1/getMarket
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/otc/api/v1/getMarket
Auth: None (public)
Description: Gets OTC market information
Required params: none

### Request for Quote

POST /api/v1/quote
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/otc/api/v1/quote
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Request for a quote. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: baseCurrency, orderCurrency, orderSizeInBaseCurrency, orderAmountInOrderCurrency, clientOrderId, side

### Accept Quote

POST /api/v1/accept/{quoteId}
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/otc/api/v1/accept/{quoteId}
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Accepts a quote.
Required params: none

### Query Order

POST /api/v1/queryOrder/{quoteId}
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/otc/api/v1/queryOrder/{quoteId}
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Query order information. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none
